properties.property: {"id":2,"name":"Controls","x":0,"y":2,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":31,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":30,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["Ask the player which the floor they want to go to, "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["and store it in Game Variable 11."]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["The difference between this and the current floor (in "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["Game Variable 10) determines which wall animation is "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["played, as well as how many times it is played."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["Which floor do you want?"]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["5F","4F","3F"],0]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"5F"]},{"c":122,"i":1,"p":[11,11,0,0,5]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"4F"]},{"c":122,"i":1,"p":[11,11,0,0,4]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[2,"3F"]},{"c":122,"i":1,"p":[11,11,0,0,3]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["2F","1F","Cancel"],3]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"2F"]},{"c":122,"i":1,"p":[11,11,0,0,2]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"1F"]},{"c":122,"i":1,"p":[11,11,0,0,1]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[2,"Cancel"]},{"c":115,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["Exit this event immediately if the destination floor is "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["the current
